MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Fred Keeperman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc., a Corporation.
Chris Cassidy, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Warren James Bottomley, a/k/a Warren J. Bottomley, a/k/a Warren Bottomley, or BNB Partners, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, he Court rules in favor of Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Warren James Bottomley, a/k/a Warren J. Bottomley, a/k/a Warren Bottomley, and BNB Partners, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $58,284.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,601.48.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs $535.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $64,245.77.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
